query: I've finalized a decision that all internal services will use gRPC. Propagate it across our PRD, architecture, and test-design docs so they all agree.
We just settled that the Tier-C microVM sandbox is the v1 baseline. Update every existing planning doc that still describes the old tiered-sandbox approach so they match.
A decision was approved after we'd already written the specs, and now the docs disagree with it. Bring the prose planning artifacts into agreement with the new decision.
We've hit a problem mid-sprint and I'm not sure whether to cut scope or change the plan. Help me work out what to do about it.
I changed a type in the shared contracts library. Which dependent repos break, and what semver bump should the contracts library get?
Help me brainstorm some name ideas for my new note-taking app.
